'''Calk Fen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] accountant in the employ of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. He was responsible for maintaining [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] debt file in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], which rose from 224,190 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]<ref name="Balance" /> to more than 1.5 million over the course of three [[Standard year/Legends|years]].<ref name="Reb">''[[Rebellion Era Sourcebook]]''</ref> Fen recommended that Jabba forget about capturing Solo and focus on claiming possession of the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] instead,<ref name="Balance">{{WEGCite|story=Balancing the Books|book=The Star Wars Sourcebook|reprint=1}}</ref> and suggested doubling [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett's]] bonus.<ref name="Reb" />
